description: Style Noteformal pants are something that men can wear anywhere.. they can wear it to work as well as a function after work or even a party.scullers formal pants look best if worn with a formal shirt and instantly you will look like the boss.Product DetailsGrey full length pants with welt pockets in front and two buttoned pockets at the back, has a buttoned ziper with loops at the waist bandMaterial and Care98% cotton and 2% lycraHand wash or machine wash coldWash dark colours separatelyTumble dry lowDo not bleachFit and SizeThe model (height 6' and waist 32&rdquo ) is wearing a size 32
